ops.body: SHIPPED as f274ce93001a. dpo_degenerate drops identical or normalized word-Levenshtein < DPO_DEGENERACY_FLOOR=0.005 pairs post-dedup (E26's d_word metric exactly; rapidfuzz>=3.9 to core deps).
